title: RimCrafting
description: A mod that will transfer a lot of content from the RimWorld to Minecraft!
body:
# RimCrafting
![RimCrafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e0f0da952855e17b95be0298e50da2a1d137d84.png)
### Description
This modification will bring to the game some resources, armor, technology, animals from Rimworld, as well as some fantasies about the interweaving of these two universes. The modification does not transfer all the Rimworld content, but only some part slightly modified to match the Minecraft style.
If you find a bug or a flaw, you can write about it on the mod's discord server
